uspTitle:
Founder & IVF Expert
Dr. Gauri Agarwal
name: Dr. Gauri Agarwal
subtitle: Founder & Chief IVF Specialist
description: Dr. Gauri Agarwal, Founder and Director of Seeds of Innocens IVF & Genestring Labs (Chain of Molecular, Genetic, and Pathology Labs). With over 15 years of experience in the field, she has played a pivotal role in bringing innovative fertility solutions to India and beyond. Trained at the prestigious medical institutions in Belgium and Singapore, Dr. Gauri Agarwal has been at the forefront of introducing advanced reproductive technologies and evidence-based fertility treatments. Under the leadership, Seeds of Innocens IVF has expanded globally, establishing IVF centres in Muscat (Oman) and Lusaka (Zambia), which is a significant milestone as one of India’s leading homegrown IVF brands with an international presence.

Seeds of Innocens IVF is recognized as one of the best IVF centres in India and internationally. It is also the FIRST IVF centre in India to be equipped with an in-house genetic testing laboratory, which has enabled comprehensive fertility care and improved treatment outcomes. It was her vision that led Genestring Labs to become India’s First and Largest Airport Covid-19 testing Lab situated at IGI International Airport, New Delhi.

Also, testimony to her magnetic presence is that her recent interaction on Lallantop.com is an online platform catering to the Indian audience, garnering an astonishing 10 million plus views across the social media platforms.

Another podcast with a renowned media personality, Shubhankar Mishra, has also garnered over 8 million views. Adding to her remarkable story, she has also been recognized as a Times 40 under 40 Healthcare Leaders in India 2022.

This centre is recognized for its high success rates and commitment to delivering customized and ethical care to each patient. Dr. Gauri Agarwal is dedicated to improving women’s health, especially in rural areas. She is working towards spreading awareness about reproductive health and breaking the stigma surrounding infertility through education and outreach initiatives.
qualification: Diplomate of National Board, Bachelor of Medicine, Bachelor of Surgery, Doctor of Medicine
specialization: IVF, Reproductive Endocrinology, Advanced Fertility Techniques
workExperience: Founder & Director at Seeds of Innocence (India, Oman & Africa).
Leading Gynecologist and highly respected IVF specialist with over 15 years of experience in Advanced Infertility Treatment & Reproductive Genetics.
education: MD, DNB, MBBS
Trained in Embryology at the National University of Singapore
Fellowship in IVF & ART from Ghent University, Belgium
Stanford University Graduate: School of Business
FDGSI Fertility Specialist
awards: The coveted Business World Healthcare 40 under 40 Leaders in India 2022
The prestigious Times 40 under 40 Healthcare Leaders in India 2022
The ET Healthworld: Induction into the Hall of Fame as the IVF Virtuoso of 2022

Previously, she was associated with Life Technologies (Thermofisher Scientific) as Technical Support Lead, South Asia.

awards: Molecular Diagnostics, Genomics, Reproductive Health Science, Next Generation Sequencing Technology, High Throughput Automated DNA Sequencing, Real Time PCR, Micro Array, and Forensics.
She has been instrumental in running the COVID-19 testing laboratory at IGI Airport, handling about 10,000 samples a day.
Her forte is Quality Management Systems, Research, and Molecular Diagnostics.

uspTitle:

subtitle: Genetic Expert
description: Dr Ranjana Mishra is a knowledgeable and highly experienced Clinical genetic expert. She works as a Senior consultant Clinical Genetics at Seeds of Innocens IVF, Delhi NCR. Her main focus is to counsel patients about inherited genetic disorders, and personalized reproductive medicine. She helps couples to gain knowledge about the genetic risks and make informed decisions about the fertility journey.

specialization: Medical Genetics, Obstetrics & Gynaecology, Reproductive Medicine
workExperience: She has more than 25 years of experience in the field of medical genetics and obstetrics & gynaecology. Before this, she served as a Senior Medical Officer at Lok Nayak Government Hospital, Delhi; Junior Research Fellow at the Indian Council of Medical Research (ICMR), Delhi; Medical Officer at Sardar Vallabhai Patel Hospital, Delhi; and Senior Resident at Sir Ganga Ram & Sardar Vallabhai Patel Hospital, Delhi.
education: She completed her MBBS from Motilal Nehru Medical College and DGO from King George’s Medical University. She has also earned a DNB (Obs & Gynae) degree from Army Hospital, Research & Referral, and DNB-SS (Medical Genetics) from Sir Ganga Ram Hospital. She has good expertise in genetic research and technology.
Dr. Ranjana is actively involved in research and various publications. Her compassionate approach and comprehensive genetic counselling empowers patients
awards: Genetic work up of  Primary/secondary infertility, Recurrent pregnancy loss, unexplained still birth, previous affected child with any genetic disorder (thalassemia, SMA, autism etc.), or family history of any genetic disorder including hereditary cancers. She also has expertise in various pre-implantation genetic testing procedures (PGT-A, PGT-SR, PGT-M) ensuring healthy pregnancies for couples

uspTitle:
Surgery & Fertility
Dr. Pratik Kakani
name: Dr. Pratik Kakani
subtitle: IVF Specialist
description: For the past 10 years, Dr. Pratik Kakani has dedicated his career to the intersection of advanced surgery and reproductive medicine. We believe that a surgical diagnosis should not be the end of your fertility journey, but a new beginning.
Why Dr. Pratik Kakani?
Expertise: Specialists solely in performing surgical interventions to maximize the possibility of pregnancy.
Challenging Cases: Specializes in 'large uterine fibroids' and cases of stage IV endometriosis, which other surgeons would consider challenging.
Philosophy: People first – We do not treat patients' scans, we treat them!
qualification: MBBS, MS (Obstetrics & Gynecology), FMAS
specialization: IVF, Advanced Fertility Treatments, Complex Cases
workExperience: Dr. Pratik Kakani has extensive experience with endoscopic surgery in gynecology. In addition to that, he has performed a vast number of independent laparoscopic surgeries, some of which are TLH, LAVH, Ovarian cystectomy, salpingectomy, and diagnostic hystero-laparoscopy. In addition to that, he has worked as:
Consultant Laparoscopic Gynecologist at Rejoice Hospital, Delhi
Assistant Professor at HBT Medical College and RN Cooper Hospital, Mumbai
Post Graduate Medical Officer at V.N. Desai Hospital, Santacruz
Senior Resident at Rural Medical College, Loni
He is recognized for his patient-oriented approach, surgical precision, and excellent management of complex gynecological cases.

Areas of Specialization: I. Removal of Complicated Fibroid (Myomectomy) Large or multiple fibroids affect the uterine cavity and prevent implantation. Our expertise lies in: High Volume Myomectomies: Performing safe myomectomy of 'huge' fibroids and reconstructing the uterine wall. Preservation of Uterine Structural Integrity: Taking care of uterine reconstruction to conceive in the future. II. Management of Endometriosis Endometriosis is not just painful menstruation, but the major reason behind infertility. Surgery for Removal of Endometrial Implants: Focusing on excision and not ablation of the lesions. Protection of Ovarian Reserve: Techniques used in treating endometriomas without damaging the ovaries. Complete Excision Surgery: Rather than focusing on ablation, our expertise lies in complete excision surgery for endometrial implants. Proper Ovarian Reserve Preservation Techniques: Specialized techniques to manage endometriomas without affecting healthy ovarian tissues. III. Treatment of Adenomyosis Since this disease entity can often be misdiagnosed, a more nuanced approach to surgery will be required. We provide specialized surgeries that will decrease the symptoms and improve the receptivity of the embryo.
education: Master's Degree (Obstetrics & Gynecology)- Rural Medical College, Loni
Fellowship in Minimal Access Surgery (FMAS)- AMASI
MBBS- Dr. Panjabro Deshmukh Memorial Medical College, Amravati
Clinical Fellowship in Gynecologic Endoscopy- Dr. Hemant Kanojiya, Excell Endo Care, Mumbai
Clinical Electives-Florida International University, Miami, USA
awards: Dr. Pratik Kakani is a distinguished member of the best medical associations, namely FOGSI, IAGE, AMASI, GOGS, MOGS, NQOCN, and WHTF.

Dr. Pratik Kakani has several published articles nationally and internationally. He has contributed to the literature regarding the effects of prostaglandin, uterine rupture, induction techniques, and pediatric respiratory infection.
His involvement in teaching and mentoring undergraduate/postgraduate students was significant when he worked in academia.

He served as a preceptor to the medical students and residents in Gynecology
Now he is the centre head at SOI Kasargod
education: 2007-08–2013-06 MBBS SS IMS&RC–Davangere
2017-06-2019-06 DGO: Obstetrics and Gynaecology, MRMC Medical College Research Hospital, Gulbarga.
2022-02–2024-02 DNB in OBG: Obstetric and Gynaecology, National Board of Examination, New Delhi
awards: National level Infertility quiz finalist 2022
Presentation at KJK ADVANCES 2023

uspTitle:
Leading IVF Specialist
Dr. Sonia Raju
name: Dr. Sonia Raju
subtitle: IVF Specialist
description: Dr. Sonia Raju Aluvilayil is a highly skilled fertility expert and IVF expert with more than 10 years of extensive experience in the field of obstetrics, gynecology, and reproductive medicine. Also, she brings deep understanding and global exposure of infertility treatment protocols, having worked across reputed institutions in India and abroad. She is well-known for her patient-centric approach and proficiency in treating high-risk pregnancies, difficult infertility cases, and recurrent IVF failures. Also, she is now a proud member of the Seeds of Innocens IVF family.
qualification: MBBS, MS (OBGYN), DNB, FRM, DRM
specialization: IVF, Unexplained Infertility, Recurrent Pregnancy Loss
workExperience: Dr. Sonia Raju started her career with a 3-year residency in Obstetrics and Gynecology at TNMC Mumbai, where she has gained hands-on experience in managing difficult cases such as placenta previa and difficult cesarean deliveries.
Moreover, she served as an Assistant Professor at GMC Latur, handling more than 8000 deliveries annually and training residents in both clinical and surgical procedures.

She pursued a Fellowship in Reproductive Medicine at the prestigious Craft Hospital & Research Centre, Kerala, where she was trained in handling complex male and female infertility cases, which include ovulation induction, IVF, IUI/ICSI, and Embryology Lab techniques.

She has independently performed oocyte retrievals, IUIs, follicular scans, and embryo transfers. Also, she has been involved in crucial obstetric cases, which include multiple pregnancies, placenta previa, and molar pregnancies.
